title: Automated Client Onboarding for a Small Accounting Firm
summary: A no-code intake and reminder workflow that fits a 20-person firm and a sub-$10k/mo budget.
insight: The win here is eliminating manual chase emails, not building a platform.

evaluated.name: Content Snare
evaluated.reason: Purpose-built document collection with automatic reminders, no-code.

evaluated.name: Custom build on internal tooling
evaluated.reason: No engineering team; overkill for the volume.

tools.name: Content Snare
tools.whyForYou: No-code, priced for small firms, handles the chase-email problem directly.
